education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science and Engineering

research.title: Post-baccalaureate Research Assistant
research.org: Center for Computational & Data Sciences, Independent University, Bangladesh
bullets: **Research Interests:** Vision–language models, domain adaptation, federated learning, and medical imaging. Working on and co-supervising undergraduate theses and center-led projects in these areas.
**Teaching Support:** Introduction to Programming, Data Structures, AI, ML, and Image Processing.
**Publications:** Q1 Journals ×2, ACL (A*), WACV (A), ICIP ×3 (B), AACL (B), IJCNN (B), and multiple workshop papers, including one in AAAI.

teaching.title: Post-baccalaureate Teaching Assistant
teaching.org: Independent University, Bangladesh, Dept. of Computer Science and Engineering
bullets: Prepared the lab materials, provided programming support, and addressed student queries during lab sessions for Neural Networks and Data Mining course.

teaching.title: Undergraduate Teaching Assistant
teaching.org: Independent University, Bangladesh, Department of Physical Sciences
bullets: Offered one-on-one tutoring to struggling students from various disciplines at Math Tutorial Center.
Worked with other tutors to manage the center and make sure students got the support they needed.

projects.title: LLM Based Automated Website Vulnerability Scanner
bullets: Worked on an automated web vulnerability scanner for autonomous reconnaissance, scanning, and vulnerability detection. Integrated a browser agent to simulate attacks (e.g., SQL injection, DDoS).

projects.title: Predicting Restaurant Orders with USTGCN
bullets: Built a tool to forecast the number of orders a restaurant would receive the next day based on the last 7 days of order data, using a unified spatio-temporal graph convolutional network.

projects.title: RGC - Python Package
bullets: Created a Python package for preprocessing radio signals received from radio telescopes to produce clean, noise-free images and classify them using established machine learning models.

awards.text: Received the **Best Long Paper Award** - BLP Workshop @ IJCNLP–AACL 2025.
Received the **IEEE Signal Processing Society Travel Grant** of **US $1,000** for joining the **2024 IEEE ICIP** in Abu Dhabi, UAE (October 27-30).
IUB academic honors: **VC's List (3×)**, **Dean's Merit List**, and **Dean's List**.
**Winner:** Intra IUB Tech Fest Programming Contest (Summer 2019) and ACM Week Code Debugging Contest (2019).
Represented IUB in the **ICPC Asia Dhaka Regional 2019** and participated in various workshops, programming contests, and Olympiads.

coursework: Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Image Processing, Numerical Methods, Linear Algebra and Differential Equation, Multivariable Calculus, Ordinary Differential Equation, Boundary Value Problem

skills.items: PyTorch, PyTorch-Lightning, LLaMA-Factory, Hugging Face, Flower, Scikit-learn
Git, Docker, Apptainer, HTCondor, Slurm, MATLAB, LaTeX
